text: A man looks at a skateboard with a pre-teenaged boy,
A man lays in bed with a thermometer sticking out of his mouth, and medicine on the night stand next to his bed.
An old clock tower next to a modern glass building.
There is a person typing on a computer
A teddy bear and a book propped on the ledge of a window.
A person taking a picture over a fence with her phone.
A wooden vase with flowers in front of a mirror.
A tiny baby sits next to a large teddy bear on a couch.
A cat and a large clock in a room.
Children playing in water from fire hydrant with girl sitting near curb.
